subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet that hath been sent down in truth from the presence of God, the Mighty, the All-Knowing. Blessed are they whom trials have not withheld from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح نزل بالحق من لدی الله العزیز العلام طوبی للذین مامنعهم الافتتان عن
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
